records.question: What incidents involve a subject whose first name is Everrado and last name is Torres?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT incidents.case_number FROM incidents
JOIN subjects ON incidents.case_number = subjects.case_number
WHERE subjects.last_name = 'Torres' AND subjects.first_name = 'Everrado'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT incidents.case_number
FROM incidents
JOIN subjects ON incidents.case_number = subjects.case_number
WHERE subjects.first_name = 'Everrado' AND subjects.last_name = 'Torres'

records.question: What incidents involving an injured subject with a vehicle on 2003/10/30 were handled by male officer Nekheel Gaitonde?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT incidents.case_number FROM incidents
JOIN officers ON incidents.case_number = officers.case_number
WHERE incidents.subject_statuses = 'Injured' AND officers.gender = 'M' AND incidents.date = '2003/10/30' AND incidents.subject_weapon = 'Vehicle' AND officers.last_name = 'Gaitonde' AND officers.first_name = 'Nekheel'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT i.case_number
FROM incidents i
JOIN officers o ON i.case_number = o.case_number
WHERE i.date = '2003-10-30'
  AND i.subject_statuses LIKE '%injured%'
  AND i.subject_weapon LIKE '%vehicle%'
  AND o.gender = 'male'
  AND o.full_name = 'Nekheel Gaitonde'

records.question: Which incidents that have related officers and related subjects occurred on 2009/9/21, have exactly one subject whose gender is exactly 'M'?

SELECT incidents.case_number FROM incidents
JOIN officers ON incidents.case_number = officers.case_number
JOIN subjects ON incidents.case_number = subjects.case_number

JOIN officers o ON i.case_number = o.case_number
JOIN subjects s ON i.case_number = s.case_number

HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT s.case_number || s.full_name) = COUNT(DISTINCT s.case_number || s.full_name)

records.question: Which incidents on 2010/11/16 at 8059 L.B.J. Freeway involved at most one subject named Williams who was injured, armed with a Pellet Gun, and had officers including Michael W/M; Curtis?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT incidents.case_number FROM incidents
WHERE incidents.subjects LIKE '%Williams%' AND incidents.subject_weapon = 'Pellet Gun' AND incidents.officers LIKE '%Michael W/M; Curtis%' AND incidents.location = '8059 L.B.J. Freeway' AND incidents.subject_count <= 1 AND incidents.subject_statuses = 'Injured' AND incidents.date = '2010/11/16'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT i.case_number
FROM incidents i
JOIN subjects s ON i.case_number = s.case_number
JOIN officers o ON i.case_number = o.case_number
WHERE i.date = '2010-11-16'
  AND i.location = '8059 L.B.J. Freeway'
  AND i.subject_weapon = 'Pellet Gun'
  AND i.subject_statuses LIKE '%injured%'
  AND s.last_name = 'Williams'
  AND i.subject_count <= 1
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM officers o1
    WHERE o1.case_number = i.case_number
      AND o1.full_name LIKE '%Michael W/M%'
  )
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM officers o2
    WHERE o2.case_number = i.case_number
      AND o2.full_name LIKE '%Curtis%'
  )
GROUP BY i.case_number

JOIN officers o ON i.case_number = o.case_number
WHERE i.date = '2012-12-14'
  AND i.location = '4542 W. Kiest Boulevard'
  AND s.full_name LIKE '%Ellis%'
  AND i.subject_statuses LIKE '%deceased%'
  AND i.subject_weapon LIKE '%handgun%'
  AND o.full_name LIKE '%Daniel%'
  AND o.gender = 'M'
GROUP BY i.case_number

records.question: Which incidents at 5716 Winton Street involved an unarmed subject named Parish Kimble who is Black, with a male officer named Hodack and no more than one subject involved?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT incidents.case_number FROM incidents
JOIN officers ON incidents.case_number = officers.case_number
JOIN subjects ON incidents.case_number = subjects.case_number
WHERE officers.last_name = 'Hodack' AND incidents.location = '5716 Winton Street' AND subjects.last_name = 'Kimble' AND subjects.first_name = 'Parish' AND officers.gender = 'M' AND incidents.subject_count <= 1 AND subjects.race = 'B' AND incidents.subject_weapon = 'Unarmed'

SELECT i.case_number
FROM incidents i
JOIN subjects s ON i.case_number = s.case_number
JOIN officers o ON i.case_number = o.case_number
WHERE i.location = '5716 Winton Street'
  AND i.subject_weapon = 'unarmed'
  AND s.full_name = 'Parish Kimble'
  AND s.race = 'Black'
  AND o.gender = 'male'
  AND o.last_name = 'Hodack'
  AND i.subject_count <= 1

records.question: Which incidents on 2015/8/27 involved male officers and Black subjects, and include Bertrand B/M among the subjects?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT incidents.case_number FROM incidents
JOIN officers ON incidents.case_number = officers.case_number
JOIN subjects ON incidents.case_number = subjects.case_number
WHERE incidents.date = '2015/8/27' AND officers.gender = 'M' AND subjects.race = 'B' AND incidents.subjects LIKE '%Bertrand B/M%'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT i.case_number
FROM incidents i
JOIN officers o ON i.case_number = o.case_number
JOIN subjects s ON i.case_number = s.case_number
WHERE i.date = '2015-08-27'
  AND o.gender = 'male'
  AND s.race = 'Black'
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM subjects sub
    WHERE sub.case_number = i.case_number
      AND sub.last_name = 'Bertrand'
      AND sub.gender = 'M'
  )
